fields.name: family
fields.label: Control Family
fields.description: Required NIST control family such as `AC`, `AU`, `SC`, `IA`, or `CM`.

fields.name: baseline
fields.label: Baseline
fields.description: Optional baseline depth for the family analysis.

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment
fields.description: Optional environment profile for cloud-specific guidance.

fields.name: showControls
fields.label: Show all controls
fields.description: Include the full control listing for the selected family.

fields.name: implementationOnly
fields.label: Implementation guidance only
fields.description: Skip theory and focus on implementation guidance.
